label: Kill Switch
description: Emergency intervention panel: scope selector, kill-switch actions, rationale input, and impact preview.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary wraps all widgets via widget-wrapper.tsx line 89

0.5.note: No lib/mocks imports in widget file

0.6.note: isLoading guard combines alertsLoading || strategiesLoading; Skeleton rendered while loading

0.7.note: Empty state handled: strategies.length === 0 shows 'No strategies available.' and hides entity Select

0.8.note: Global WidgetErrorBoundary covers runtime errors per spec 0.8

0.9.note: No dead code. Action buttons without onClick are UI shells pending execution API wiring — noted as L4.1 concern, not dead code

1.1.note: Data sourced from useAlertsData() context hook; strategy list from useStrategyHealth() API hook (no inline fetch)

1.2.note: AlertsDataProvider reads useGlobalScope() and filters allAlerts by scopeStrategyIds

1.3.note: allAlerts memoized on scope.organizationIds; org filter change triggers re-filter of filteredAlerts used for activeEntityAlerts

1.4.note: scope.clientIds included in allAlerts memo dependency; cascades through getStrategyIdsForScope

1.5.note: scope.strategyIds included in getStrategyIdsForScope call in context

1.6.note: scopeStrategyIds.length === 0 guard in filteredAlerts: empty scope returns all alerts unfiltered

1.7.note: No reference data in this widget; action types are inline constants (correct location)

l1.notes: Widget is primarily an action panel. Scope filtering is inherited through filteredAlerts from context.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain, tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests in __tests__/integration/entitlement-wiring.test.ts, __tests__/components/platform/*entitlement-gate.test.tsx, __tests__/lib/config/trading-entitlements.test.ts). Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

3.1.note: Mode relevance: live ✓ (actions enabled), batch ✓ (all 5 action buttons + rationale input disabled when isBatchMode; handlers short-circuit with toast.info 'Read-only in batch mode'), paper ✓ (same as live). Batch-mode guard landed 2026-04-21 audit pass.

3.2.note: AlertsDataProvider reads scope.mode; isBatchMode derived from scope.mode === 'batch'. Widget now consumes isBatchMode from useAlertsData() and uses it for (a) disabled prop on each action button + Confirm + rationale input, (b) early-return with toast.info in handleSelectAction + handleConfirm.

3.5.note: Paper mode: behavior same as live. Kill-switch actions are execution-level interventions — paper mode definition deferred pending paper mode UI toggle landing.

3.6.note: No WebSocket or polling interval in widget. useStrategyHealth and useAlerts both respect batch mode refetchInterval: false in their hooks.

l3.notes: Agent checks 3.1/3.2/3.5/3.6 complete. Human checks 3.3/3.4 pending. Gap identified: kill-switch action buttons should be disabled in batch mode but currently lack both onClick handlers and batch guards — flagged in L4 known issue.

4.1.note: alerts-kill-switch-widget.tsx — action buttons wired and Confirm posts to useKillSwitch (POST /api/execution/kill-switch in live, mock returns synthetic request_id in mock mode). Selected action highlighted with critical bg + 2px ring + bolder label. Batch-mode guards still active.
4.1.fix: Confirm Action calls killSwitch.mutate with {action, scope, entity_id, rationale, idempotency_key}; success toast surfaces request_id + accepted_at; error toast surfaces err.message.

4.2.note: No href='#' or link elements found.

4.3.note: scopeType now drives the entity select. firm → hides entity dropdown with 'Applies to entire firm'; strategy → useStrategyHealth list; client → scope.clientIds from useGlobalScope; venue → hardcoded VENUE_OPTIONS (binance/deribit/ibkr/okx) pending venues hook. Label and placeholder driven by SCOPE_ENTITY_LABEL map. Effect resets entityId when scope or options change.
4.3.fix: Added entityOptions useMemo keyed on scopeType, SCOPE_ENTITY_LABEL map, and conditional render that hides the dropdown for firm scope. Hardcoded VENUE_OPTIONS noted as a placeholder until a venues hook lands — see knownIssues.

4.5.note: No navigation links to gated pages.

4.6.note: No entitlement checks in render. All handled at widget-wrapper level via registry.

5.1.note: Target strategies: all strategy types (scope selector allows firm/client/strategy/venue). Entity select now scoped to scopeType: strategy — useStrategyHealth, client — scope.clientIds, venue — VENUE_OPTIONS, firm — hidden.

5.3.note: Frontend execution flow wired via useKillSwitch (BFR-001). Mock mode returns synthetic request_id after ~150ms; live mode posts to /api/execution/kill-switch. Backend endpoint implementation pending — tracked via BFR-001 in docs/audits/backend-feature-requests.md.

l5.notes: 5.1 + 5.3 (frontend) complete. Human checks 5.2/5.4/5.5/5.6 pending live backend endpoint.

l6.notes: Deferred — L6 (tests) not in scope for this agent pass.

7.1.note: Mapped --status-error → text-status-critical / bg-status-critical (existing token surfaced in new rollout). All var(--status-error) usages at lines 93,100,107,123,125 converted. text-[var(--status-warning)] on Pause icon also converted to text-status-warning token utility in 2026-04-21 audit pass.
7.1.fix: Substituted text-[var(--status-error)] → text-status-critical and bg-[var(--status-error)]/5 border-[var(--status-error)]/20 → bg-status-critical/5 border-status-critical/20. Also substituted text-[var(--status-warning)] → text-status-warning on Pause icon.

7.2.note: No lib/mocks imports. Strategy list from useStrategyHealth API hook. No duplicated fixtures.

7.3.note: 141 lines — well within 500-line limit. Single function component, no function exceeds 200 lines.

7.4.note: AlertsKillSwitchWidget: PascalCase ✓. useAlertsData/useStrategyHealth: useCamelCase ✓. File: alerts-kill-switch-widget.tsx kebab-case ✓.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.6.note: No dangerouslySetInnerHTML, eval, new Function, or innerHTML= found.

7.7.note: useEffect dep array: [strategies, entityId] — both stable refs. handleSelectAction/handleConfirm wrapped in useCallback with [isBatchMode]/[isBatchMode,selectedAction,rationale,scopeType,entityId] deps respectively. ACTION_OPTIONS declared at module scope. No inline object/array literals in deps.

l7.notes: 7.1 fixed via --status-error → text-status-critical and text-[var(--status-warning)] → text-status-warning mappings. 7.5 deferred (i18n). All other checks pass.

8.1.note: text-[10px] → text-micro applied on action sub-labels. text-[11px] at former lines 65,126 substituted with text-caption token (0.6875rem) in 2026-04-21 audit pass. No remaining arbitrary text-[Npx] values.
8.1.fix: Substituted text-[10px] → text-micro and text-[11px] → text-caption across all action sub-labels, empty-state text, and impact preview text.

8.2.note: No spacing arbitrary values (p-[...], m-[...], gap-[...]) found.

8.3.note: Uses Button, Card, CardContent, Input, Select family, Skeleton — all from components/ui/*. No raw div replacements for shared primitives.

8.4.note:
Fixed: (1) 'Scope' label: converted to id='kill-switch-scope-label' + SelectTrigger aria-labelledby='kill-switch-scope-label'. (2) 'Actions' label: promoted to

(not form-associated, no input to label). (3) 'Rationale (required)' label: added htmlFor='kill-switch-rationale' + Input id='kill-switch-rationale'. (4) entity Select: added aria-label='Select entity'. Human keyboard walkthrough pending.
8.4.fix: Added aria-labelledby on scope SelectTrigger, htmlFor+id on rationale label+input, aria-label on entity SelectTrigger, converted orphan Actions label to

8.5.note: Human pending: resize test at minW=3, minH=4.

l8.notes: 8.1 partially fixed — text-[10px] → text-micro applied; text-[11px] retained (no 11px token in this rollout). 8.2/8.3 pass. 8.4 agent fixes applied. 8.5 requires human.

keepSeparate.rationale: Emergency intervention panel with distinct UX requirements: prominent placement, rationale input, impact preview before confirmation. Not mergeable with alerts-table (different interaction model — table is observe+acknowledge, kill-switch is emergency-stop).

relationships.notes: Standalone action panel. Reads filteredAlerts from shared context for impact preview count. Does not emit a selection key to drive other widgets. Strategy list from useStrategyHealth — independent of alerts-table's selection state.

dataContract.notes: Reads from two sources: (1) AlertsDataContext (alerts-service, /api/alerts/list). (2) useStrategyHealth (/api/analytics/strategies or seed fallback). Write path (kill-switch actions) not yet wired — execution API service TBD.

gaps: Venue list is hardcoded (binance/deribit/ibkr/okx) — swap to a real venues hook when one lands
Client list reuses scope.clientIds (id-only labels) — wants a clients hook with display names
Backend endpoint /api/execution/kill-switch not implemented — frontend wired, server pending (BFR-001)
coverage.notes: Widget UI shell complete, accessible, batch-guarded, scope-driven entity select, real mutation hook. Outstanding work is backend endpoint + richer client/venue lookup hooks.

knownIssues.description: Backend /api/execution/kill-switch endpoint not yet implemented. Frontend mutation wired via useKillSwitch (BFR-001); mock mode returns synthetic accepts.

Venue scope uses a hardcoded VENUE_OPTIONS list (binance/deribit/ibkr/okx); client scope uses raw scope.clientIds for both id and label. Replace with proper hooks (useVenues, useClients) when those land.

findings.description: alerts-kill-switch-widget.tsx:86,93,100,107,121,123,125 — var(--status-error) used for icon colors and impact preview card; --status-error not defined in globals.css
findings.fix: Mapped --status-error → text-status-critical / bg-status-critical (existing token). Substituted text-[var(--status-error)] → text-status-critical on icons (lines 93,100,107) and impact preview heading (line 125); bg-[var(--status-error)]/5 border-[var(--status-error)]/20 → bg-status-critical/5 border-status-critical/20 on impact preview Card (line 123).

findings.description: alerts-kill-switch-widget.tsx — 23+ user-visible strings (scope labels, action names, sub-labels, rationale placeholder, impact preview text)
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: alerts-kill-switch-widget.tsx:65,89,96,103,110,122,126 — text-[11px] and text-[10px] arbitrary font sizes for action sub-labels and impact preview content
findings.fix: Substituted text-[10px] → text-micro (new 0.625rem token in @theme inline) on action sub-labels (lines 89,96,103,110). text-[11px] on lines 65,122 left as-is — no ~11px token landed in this rollout; raise separately if needed.

findings.description: alerts-kill-switch-widget.tsx — label elements missing htmlFor/aria-labelledby associations for Select and Input controls
findings.fix: Added aria-labelledby='kill-switch-scope-label' on scope SelectTrigger, htmlFor='kill-switch-rationale' + id='kill-switch-rationale' on rationale label+Input, aria-label='Select entity' on entity SelectTrigger, converted orphan 'Actions' label to

findings.description: Missing isLoading guard. Fixed: skeleton displayed while alertsLoading || strategiesLoading.
alerts-kill-switch-widget.tsx — Pause Strategy, Cancel Orders, Flatten, Disable Venue, Confirm Action buttons had no onClick handlers (dead buttons)
findings.fix: Promoted 4 action buttons to a role='radiogroup' with aria-checked + local selectedAction state. Confirm Action now validates (selectedAction, rationale) and emits toast.info('Execution API not yet wired') with a precise description of the would-be action + scope. All 5 buttons + rationale input are disabled in batch mode via isBatchMode from useAlertsData(), with handleSelectAction / handleConfirm short-circuiting to toast.info('Read-only in batch mode').

findings.description: alerts-kill-switch-widget.tsx:86 — text-[var(--status-warning)] arbitrary variable reference on Pause icon
findings.fix: Substituted text-[var(--status-warning)] → text-status-warning (token utility already exposed via --color-status-warning in globals.css @theme inline).

findings.description: alerts-kill-switch-widget.tsx — residual text-[11px] at two sites (no-strategies fallback + impact preview body)
findings.fix: Substituted text-[11px] → text-caption (0.6875rem, already defined as --text-caption in globals.css @theme inline). No remaining text-[Npx] arbitrary values.

findings.description: alerts-kill-switch-widget.tsx — entity Select always showed strategies regardless of scopeType; firm scope still rendered a strategy dropdown.
findings.fix: Added entityOptions useMemo keyed on scopeType, sourced from useStrategyHealth (strategy), useGlobalScope().scope.clientIds (client), VENUE_OPTIONS placeholder (venue), or empty (firm). Firm scope hides the dropdown and shows 'Applies to entire firm'. Label + placeholder driven by SCOPE_ENTITY_LABEL map. Effect resets entityId when options change.

findings.description: Scope and Strategy dropdowns stacked vertically; selected action button only had a thin 1px ring — hard to see which intervention was chosen.
findings.fix: Promoted Scope+entity row to grid grid-cols-2 with their own labels. Selected action button now uses border-status-critical bg-status-critical/10 ring-2 ring-status-critical/60 shadow-sm + text-status-critical font-semibold on the label (vs prior thin 1px ring).

lastTokenRolloutFix: 2026-04-21 — applied --status-error → text-status-critical, text-[var(--status-warning)] → text-status-warning, text-[10px] → text-micro, text-[11px] → text-caption; wired all kill-switch buttons with batch-guard + toast feedback. 4.3 fixed: entity Select now scope-driven (strategy/client/venue/firm). UX: Scope+entity in single row, selected action highlighted with critical bg + 2px ring.
